error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters
title: Asana API returns bad request due to null date
symptom: When trying to create an Asana project from a template, the HTTP request fails with a 'Bad request - please check your parameters' error. The error details indicate that 'Day cannot be null'.
applies_when: Using HTTP Request node to call Asana API
Triggering on Pipedrive deal set to WON
not_this_if: Using a different API or node
root_cause: The Asana API requires a valid date format for the requested_dates parameter. If the date is not provided or is null, the API will return a 400 error indicating that the day cannot be null.
fix_steps: In the HTTP Request node, change the date value from {{$now.toISOString().split('T')[0]}} to {{$now.toISO()}}.
Save the workflow and test the execution again.
agent_instruction: Update the date format in the HTTP Request node to use .toISO() instead of .toISOString().
